PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: Federal 940 payments include Federal Unemployment Insurance Tax.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: Federal 941/944/943 payments include Federal Withholding, Social Security, and Medicare. IRS tax payments 100K or more must be paid next day via EFT on the EFTPS site.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due by next banking day following the day $100,000 or more of taxes is accumulated.
Due Wednesday for paychecks issued Wed-Fri. Due Friday for paychecks issued Sat-Tue.
Due the 15th of the following month. Example: Due Feb 15 for liabilities accrued in Jan.
Due the last day of the month following the end of the quarter. Example: Apr 30, Jul 31, Oct 31, and Jan 31.
Due the last day of January for liabilities accrued in the prior calendar year.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

Choice.UIString: Federal Form 941
Choice.UIDescription: This is the most common choice. Unless the IRS has notified you that you are qualified to file annually, or that you do not need to file a 941, select this form.

Choice.UIString: Federal Form 944
Choice.UIDescription: Only select 944 if the IRS has informed you that your business is eligible to file annually.

Choice.UIString: None of the above
Choice.UIDescription: If you are not required to file a 941 or 944 form, for example you only file 943, select this choice.

FormFrequency.UIDescription: Federal Form W-2/W-3 is due by the end of February (to employees by January 31st) of the following year.

FormFrequency.UIDescription: OR New Hire Form is due within 20 calendar days of start of work for all hired or rehired employees.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: RI Withholding payments include Income Tax Withholding.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due the next banking day following the payroll date.
Due 3 banking days after the end of the period. The period ends on the 7th, 15th, 22nd, and end of the month.
Due on Monday (or Tuesday if Monday is a recognized holiday) for the prior week's payroll.
Due the 20th of the next month, except for the last month of the quarter when the payment is due the last day of the month. (Feb 15, Mar 15, Apr 30, etc.)
Due the last day of the month following the end of the quarter. (Apr 30, Jul 31, Oct 31, and Jan 31)

PaymentTemplate.UIString: RI UI, SDI, JDF, and Wage Base Increase
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: RI UI payments include Unemployment Insurance, State Disability Insurance, Job Development Fund, and Wage Base Increase.

FormFrequency.UIDescription: RI New Hire Form is due within 14 calendar days of hire date for all hired or rehired employees.

Agency.UIString: SC Dept of Revenue Attn Withholding Dept
Agency.Name: SC Withholding

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: SC Withholding payments include Income Tax Withholdings.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due one banking day after payroll liability is incurred. (For example, due Wednesday for liabilities incurred on Tuesday.)
Due Wednesday for paychecks issued Wednesday-Friday. Due Friday for paychecks issued Saturday-Tuesday.
Due the 15th of the following month. (For example, due Feb 15 for liabilities accrued in Jan.)
Due 30 days after the end of the quarter. (Apr 30, Jul 30, Oct 30, and Jan 30)

FormFrequency.UIDescription: SC New Hire Form is due within 20 calendar days of start of work for all hired or rehired employees.

UT New Hire Form is due within 20 calendar days of start of work for all hired or rehired employees.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: UT Withholding payments include Income Tax Withholding.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due the last day of the following month. (For example, due Mar 31 for liabilities accrued in Feb.)
Due the last day of the month following the end of the quarter. (Apr 30, Jul 31, Oct 31, and Jan 31)
Due Jan 31 for liabilities accrued in the prior calendar year.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Enroll on EFTPS website

Login.LoginText: Enter the PIN and Internet Password you received from EFTPS, and your contact information.

InputField.Label: Internet Password
InputField.RegexErrorUIString: The value must contain at least one lowercase and one uppercase letter, and at least one number (0-9) or one of the following special characters: !,@,#,$,*,+,-

InputField.Label: Confirm Internet Password
InputField.RegexErrorUIString: The value must contain at least one lowercase and uppercase letter, and at least one number (0-9) or one of the following special characters: !,@,#,$,*,+,-

Footer.AuthorizeText: I authorize the agency to electronically debit the amount identified in the Summary section from my bank account for this payment. I verify that I'm legally authorized to make this payment to the agency on behalf of this company.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Enroll in QuickBooks to e-file Federal 94x forms

Login.LoginText: Enter the name and other information for an officer or employee of the company (NOT an accountant or agent) who is authorized to sign payroll tax forms. The information entered must match what the IRS has on file for your company.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I certify that I'm legally authorized to submit this enrollment on behalf of the organization referenced above.

Login.LoginText: Enter your 10-digit numeric PIN, including leading zeros. You received this information when you enrolled with the IRS to e-file. Remember that your credentials for IRS e-filing are not the same as your credentials for IRS e-payment. For more information, click the link to the right.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I certify that I'm legally authorized to submit this form on behalf of the organization referenced above.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Federal 94x enrollment instructions for reporting agents

Login.LoginText: Enter your Reporting Agent 6-digit numeric EFIN and 5-digit numeric PIN, including leading zeros. NOTE: The Reporting Agent PIN is not the Third-Party Designee PIN that you may have entered on the form. You received the Reporting Agent PIN when you registered with the IRS to e-file as a Reporting Agent. The IRS will reject the tax return if the wrong EFIN and Reporting Agent PIN are used.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I certify that I'm legally authorized to submit this form on behalf of the organization referenced above.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Automatic enrollment with Intuit MyTaxFolder Service

Login.EnrollText: Sending draft copies of W-2s is OK. Simply resend the W-2s once they are final to replace any W-2s you sent before. Your employees will always see the latest version you send.

Footer.AuthorizeText: (If you do not want to send W-2 information to Intuit, click Cancel.)

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Automatic enrollment with AZ Dept of Economic Security

Login.LoginText: To submit Arizona Form UC-018 and payment information to Arizona Department of Economic Security, enter the name (electronic signature), title, email address, and phone number of the person who is authorized to sign payroll tax forms and make payments on behalf of your company.

Footer.AuthorizeText: ACH Debit Authorization Agreement: By entering my electronic signature above, I am authorizing the Arizona Department of Economic Security (AZDES) to initiate a single ACH debit to my checking or savings bank account within 5 business days of transmission. I am authorized to sign this agreement on behalf of the business entity identified here and I have personally reviewed all information provided. I certify that the facts stated herein are true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. I acknowledge that the origination of an electronic payment from my account must comply with the provisions of U.S. law and NACHA (banking) Operating Rules and Regulations. By completing payment information and clicking the "Submit" button, I accept these statements and terms. This authorization is to remain in full force and effect until AZDES has received written notification of its termination from an authorized representative of the business entity identified herein at such time and in such manner as to afford AZDES and Depository a reasonable opportunity to act on it.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Automatic enrollment with MD Office of Unemployment Insurance

Login.LoginText: To submit MD Form DLLR/OUI 15 and Form DLLR/OUI 16 to the MD Office of Unemployment Insurance, enter your e-mail address and phone number. If you need to correct your federal EIN, change the name, address, or email address of your business, correct your telephone number, enter a date on which the last employee wages were paid (an account can't be closed until the state has this date on file), or indicate whether your business was acquired, you may enter the information directly on the Maryland Web site (click the WebTax link on http://www.dllr.state.md.us/) or you may email these changes to the Maryland Unemployment Insurance Employer Status unit at status@dllr.state.md.us. At the agency's request, this information is not sent with your electronic return. Once your electronic return has been accepted by the agency, any corrections to your filing must be submitted via a paper Form DLLR/OUI 21, Request for Wage Adjustment. You can obtain the form on the Maryland Division of Unemployment Insurance (DUI) web site at http://www.mdunemployment.com.

Footer.AuthorizeText: By clicking on the 'Submit' button you are certifying that the information contained herein is true and correct to the best of your knowledge.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Automatic enrollment with WA Employment Security Department

Login.LoginText: To submit your payment to the Washington Employment Security Department, enter your 9 digit WA Uniform Business Identifier (UBI), contact first and last name, employer relationship, 10-digit phone number, and e-mail address. The UBI number can be found on the Employment Security Tax Notice sent to you annually by the state, typically in the latter part of December. Enter only the first nine digits of your UBI number with no spaces (NNNNNNNNN).

PossibleFieldValues.Value: Employee of a parent corporation of the business
Accounting or CPA firm representing the business

Footer.AuthorizeText: I authorize the Washington State Employment Security Department to process the transaction as detailed above. I also certify that I am legally authorized to enter into this agreement for the above referenced business.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Automatic enrollment with WI Department of Revenue
